maay_maay.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Dhibco isku mid ah, kaliya dhinac loo rogay. Baro hal fact, ogow laba.
maay_maay.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Kani waa mid ka mid ah Tricky 15 facts — set yar oo u baahan recall dhab ah. U beddel Practice → "Tricky 15" mode si aad u drill-gareyso.
maay_maay.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Nambaro isku mid ah, afar weji. Ogaanshaha hal fact ayaa ku siinaya kuwa kale.
maay_maay.tricky_facts_to_visualize: Tricky facts oo la visualize gareeyo:
maay_maay.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Dooro pattern oo la iftiimiyo. Table-ku wuxuu ka buuxaa structure — marka aad aragto, badhkeed facts-ku waxay noqdaan kuwo la saadaalin karo.
maay_maay.multiplication_table_with_pattern_high: Multiplication table oo leh pattern highlighting
maay_maay.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Guji pattern kasta oo kore si aad u iftiimiso cells-ka oo aad u akhriso rule-ka. Patterns badan ayaa is-dulsaari kara (tusaale, 5×5 waa "5s multiple" iyo "perfect square" labadaba).
maay_maay.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Sababta patterns uga fiican yihiin brute memorization
maay_maay.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Waxaad u baahan tahay oo kaliya inaad memorize gareyso qiyaastii saddex-meelood meel table-ka.
maay_maay.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Wax kasta oo ku jira 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, 11s columns wuxuu leeyahay rule fudud. Squares-ku waa set yar (12 facts). Waxa hadhay waa "tricky middle" — qiyaastii 15 facts — oo u baahan recall dhab ah: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 iyo twins-kooda.
maay_maay.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Ma illowday 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Ka dhis fact-ka adag laba fudud. Ku celcelin ku filan kadib, jawaabtu waxay noqotaa automatic.
maay_maay.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Visualize gareynta fact kasta sida area-model rectangle (Visual tab) ama pattern (tab-kan) waxay ku siinaysaa jid u ah jawaabta oo aan u baahnayn automatic recall. Recall wuu dhismaa aakhirkii, laakiin ma aha drilling keliya.
maay_maay.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Cell kasta = multiplication fact. Color = mastery-gaaga ilaa hadda. Guji cell kasta si aad u drill-gareyso fact-kaas.
maay_maay.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Fact family — nambaro isku mid ah, afar weji
maay_maay.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Sliders ee mastery threshold iyo selected factor. Discrete 3-state outcome. Score ma jiro, reveal ma jiro.
maay_maay.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Hypothesis: Sidee threshold-ku u beddelaa feedback-ka ardayda dhibaataysan?
maay_maay.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Ka warran haddii mastery = 100%? Maxaa la ammaanaa?
maay_maay.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Design note: discrete 3-state mastery marker; raw score ma jiro; reveal ma jiro — by design.
